extDescription.message: Chrome extension that opens a daily calendar from the toolbar.

popupNoCalendarSelected.message: No calendar selected. Please choose one in settings.

popupEventLoadFailed.message: Failed to load events: $ERROR$. Reconnect Google account in settings.

optionsDescription.message: Choose the calendar used for popup display and toolbar badge.

optionsConnectFailed.message: Connection failed: $ERROR$. Create a Chrome extension OAuth client in Google Cloud Console and set oauth2.client_id in manifest.json.

oauthClientIdNotConfigured.message: OAuth client ID is not configured. Replace oauth2.client_id in manifest.json with a Chrome extension client ID issued in Google Cloud.

googleAuthIncomplete.message: Google authentication is incomplete. Click "Connect to Google" in settings and authorize.

googleTokenFetchFailed.message: Failed to obtain Google auth token.
